title: Systems Elegance Game
genericDescription: Achieve depth from few rules; tune interactions; communicate emergent possibilities.
specificDescription: Build a game with no more than five core rules, but at least three emergent strategies or interactions. Include a strategy note based on playtesters' discoveries.
gradingRubric: 30 pts systemic depth; 20 pts rule elegance; 20 pts player discovery; 15 pts clarity; 15 pts documentation.
